what_it_does: Stores ledger metadata for a design-assets channel image named 'image (51)', referencing a PNG blob, with dimensions, alt text, versioning, and authorship details.
observations: The file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger entry for an image asset.
The id is 'icons/image (51)' and the address is 'image://design-assets/icons/image (51)'.
The blob reference is 'blob://b2:6c4fa434a7ebf4ab95b0762b9ec79e7b' with mime 'image/png'.
The 'alt' field in the version record is empty.
There is a single version (v1) and created/updated timestamps are identical.
standouts: Image dimensions are recorded as 0x0 despite being an image/png.
Alt text is empty and there are no links to usage contexts.
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with a ledger-style schema.
References content by a stable blob URI.
Records versioning, timestamps, source, and author session.
Uses channel/path hierarchy for asset organization.
concerns: Zero width/height suggests incomplete ingestion or a placeholder record.
Empty alt text limits accessibility and searchability.
Generic name provides little semantic signal for discovery.
No links isolate the asset from design files or interfaces that use it.
notes: A ledger card for an unlinked, generically-named PNG icon asset with missing dimensions and no alt text.
questions: What does the icon actually depict?
Where, if anywhere, is this icon used?
Why is the alt text empty?
intention_signals: To catalog a versioned design-assets icon image and preserve its blob reference, channel location, and authorship.
contribution: Provides a persistent, versioned metadata record that links a PNG blob to a design-assets channel path and author session, even though content dimensions and relationships are absent.
summary_for_embedding: A channel-memory ledger entry for a design-assets PNG icon named 'image (51)' referencing blob b2:6c4fa434a7ebf4ab95b0762b9ec79e7b with 0x0 dimensions, empty alt text, and no links.
intention_for_embedding: To record and version a design-assets icon image in a searchable asset ledger.
